revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Yoginis]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Yoginis]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: more imports

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect[[en:Template" to "#redirect[[:en:Template"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Yoginis]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Yoginis]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{navbox | name = Yoginis | title = [[Yogini]]s | image = [[File:SAMA Yogini.jpg|40px]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listcl
| group1 = Entities | list1 = * [[Apsara]] * [[Bhairavi]] * [[Dakini]] <!--* [[Mahavidya]]--> * [[Matrika]] * [[Vajrayogini]] * [[Yakshini]]
| group2 = [[Yogini temples]] | list2 = * [[Gadarmal Devi temple|Badoh]] * [[Chausath Yogini Temple, Bhedaghat|Bhedaghat]] * [[Chausath Yogini Temple, Hirapur|Hirapur]] * [[Chausath Yogini Temple, Ranipur Jharial|Ranipur Jharial]] * [[Chausath Yogini temple, Khajuraho|Khajuraho]] * [[Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli|Mitaoli]]
| group3 = Related | list3 = * [[Maithuna]] * [[Women in Hinduism]] * [[Yoga for women]]
| below = * '''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Yoga|Category]]'''
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Yoga]] [[Category:Yoga templates]]
</noinclude>

| below = * '''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Yoga|Category]]'''

[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbox | name = Yoginis | title = [[:en:Yogini|Yogini]]s | image = [[File:SAMA Yogini.jpg|40px]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listcl
| group1 = Entities | list1 = * [[:en:Apsara|Apsara]] * [[:en:Bhairavi|Bhairavi]] * [[Dakini]]
* [[:en:Matrika|Matrika]] * [[:en:Vajrayogini|Vajrayogini]] * [[:en:Yakshini|Yakshini]]
| group2 = [[Yogini temples]] | list2 = * [[Gadarmal Devi temple|Badoh]] * [[:en:Chausath Yogini Temple, Bhedaghat|Bhedaghat]] * [[:en:Chausath Yogini Temple, Hirapur|Hirapur]] * [[:en:Chausath Yogini Temple, Ranipur Jharial|Ranipur Jharial]] * [[:en:Chausath Yogini temple, Khajuraho|Khajuraho]] * [[:en:Chausath Yogini Temple, Mitaoli|Mitaoli]]
| group3 = Related | list3 = * [[Maithuna]] * [[Women in Hinduism]] * [[Yoga for women]]
| below = * '''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Yoga|Category]]'''
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Yoga]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
